mapper.sql: id, name, remark, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM edu_teacher_title WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_teacher_title WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, name FROM edu_teacher_title WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_teacher WHERE title_id = #{titleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_teacher_title (name, remark, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{remark}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_teacher_title SET name = #{name}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_teacher_title SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_teacher_title SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
